titleStmt.title: SII 26.372: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 372. (A.R. No. 351 of 1909.) OLAKKŪR, TINDIVANAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: South wall of the Agastyēśvara temple.
This inscription contains a praśasti of the king, commencing with Pugaḻmādu viḷaṅga, etc., Mentions his queen Avanimuḻuduḍaiyāḷ.

It records that a certain Kaṇṇapākkiḻān Paṟpan Ulaganādan paved the garbhagṛiha (sanctum sanctorum) of the temple of the god Tiruvagattīśvaramuḍaiya-mahādēva of Ulakkaiyūr alias Rājamahēndra-nallūr in Ōymā-nāḍu in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam and that he also set up a pedestal (śrīpādapīṭham) a lamp-post (ney-tāṅgi) and an image of the god Vighnēśvara and gifted a nandā lamp to the god Tiruvagattīśvaramuḍaiyār. It states that the sabhai of the tiruvuṇṇāḻigai (i.e., the members in charge of the central shrine), received a sum of 5 kaḻañju of poṉ from the donor and had agreed to burn the lamp in the central shrine for ever.
At the end it is stated that the inscription is a copy of that which was engraved on the jamb of the doorway of the tiruvuṇṇāḻigai (sanctum sanctorum) the same as No. 376 below.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pukaḻmātu viḷaṅka jayamātu virumpa nilamakaḷ nilava malarmakaḷ puṇara Urimaiyiṟ ciṟan=ta maṇimuṭicūṭi minavar nilaikeṭa villavar kulaitara yeṉai mannavariyaluṟṟiḻitara
tikkaṇaittun=tan cakkara naṭātti [ vijaiyāpiṣegam] paṇṇi virasiṁhāsanattu Avanimuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kovirājageśari panmarāṉa cakkaravarttikaḷ
śrīkulottuṅkacoḻadevaṟkku yāṇṭu nāṟpattonṟāvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu Oymānāṭāṉa vijaiyarājentravaḷanāṭṭu Ulakkaiyūrāṉa rājamahentranallūrt tiruvakattiśvaramuṭaiya mahā
devaṟku garbhagrakattu talañceytu śrīpātapīṭamum neytāṅkiyuñ camaittuccātti piḷḷai vighneśvaratevarai Eḻuntaruḷivittu Āḷuṭaiyārukkuk kaṇṇi pākkiḻān paṟpan Ulakanātan
vaitta tirununtāviḷakku 1 Ittirununtā viḷakku Oṉṟukkumikkoyilil tiruvuṇāḻikai śabhaiyom kaikkoṇṭa pon Aiyṅkaḻañcum kaikkoṇṭu It tirununtāviḷakku Oṉṟu
m cantirātittavaṟ celuttakkaṭavomāka sammatittom Ikkoyilil tiruvuṇāḻikai śabhaiyom Ittirunilaikālil kalveṭṭuppaṭi .
Digital edition of SII 26.372 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
